name: canvas-lms
description: Community-built student-focused Canvas LMS workflows and API access for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Community-built student-first Canvas tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Community-built Canvas LMS plugin for Codex focused on student and course workflows: courses, grades, planner items, pages, assignments, quizzes, discussions, files, groups, sections, rubrics, outcomes, announcements, modules, and submissions. This is not an official Instructure product.
defaultPrompt: Show my current Canvas courses and grades.
Summarize this Canvas course's front page, modules, and assignments.
Show my upcoming Canvas work, quizzes, and announcements.
